qeynos.atmosphere: Guards call citizens 'citizen.' Formal, slightly paternalistic. They believe in what they protect. Reference Antonius Bayle and the Council.

qeynos2.atmosphere: Guards call citizens 'citizen.' Formal, slightly paternalistic. They believe in what they protect. Reference Antonius Bayle and the Council.

qcat.atmosphere: The catacombs beneath Qeynos. Guards here are watchful of the Bloodsaber cult lurking in the sewers. Formal, slightly paternalistic tone.

freporte.atmosphere: Guards are mercenary, self-interested, world-weary. Twenty-years-on-the-job cynicism. Not idealists -- pragmatists serving a tyrant.

freportw.atmosphere: Guards are mercenary, self-interested, world-weary. Twenty-years-on-the-job cynicism. Not idealists -- pragmatists serving a tyrant.

freportn.atmosphere: Guards are mercenary, self-interested, world-weary. Twenty-years-on-the-job cynicism. Not idealists -- pragmatists serving a tyrant.

gfaydark.atmosphere: Guards are alert, nature-attuned, brief in speech. Rangers and warriors who spend more time watching than talking. 'Respect all laws in Kelethin and her territory.'

felwithea.culture: High elf scholarly, dignified, subtly superior
felwithea.atmosphere: Ancient culture, deep magical tradition. Formal speech. Subtly superior attitude toward other races.

felwitheb.culture: High elf scholarly, dignified, subtly superior
felwitheb.atmosphere: Ancient culture, deep magical tradition. Formal speech. Subtly superior attitude toward other races.

neriaka.culture: Dark elf city, deeply tiered by social standing
neriaka.atmosphere: Foreign Quarter NPCs treat outsiders with contempt barely disguised as civility. Value cunning, power, appearances. Never warm -- even to allies, only grudging tolerance. Do not explain themselves.

neriakb.culture: Dark elf city, deeply tiered by social standing
neriakb.atmosphere: Commons area of Neriak. Value cunning, power, appearances. Never warm -- even to allies, only grudging tolerance. Do not explain themselves.

neriakc.culture: Dark elf city, deeply tiered by social standing
neriakc.atmosphere: Third Gate -- the innermost sanctum. Guards here are openly hostile to non-Dark Elves. Value cunning, power, appearances. Do not explain themselves.

erudnint.culture: Erudite intellectual hub, scholarly and formal
key_threats: The great library and high magic pursuits
Paineel (Heretic city) is an embarrassment -- not discussed casually
erudnint.atmosphere: Scholarly, formal, subtly condescending. Pursuit of knowledge above all.

erudnext.culture: Erudite intellectual hub, scholarly and formal
key_threats: The great library and high magic pursuits
Paineel (Heretic city) is an embarrassment -- not discussed casually
erudnext.atmosphere: Scholarly, formal, subtly condescending. Pursuit of knowledge above all.

kaladima.atmosphere: Love of ale, mining, and hammering things. Proud warrior culture.

kaladimb.atmosphere: Love of ale, mining, and hammering things. Proud warrior culture.

akanon.culture: Gnome city, inventive, chatty, easily distracted by technical topics
akanon.atmosphere: Say 'gnomish engineering' not 'technology.' Inventive, chatty, easily distracted by technical topics.

oggok.culture: Ogre city, simple and direct speech
oggok.atmosphere: Simple, direct speech. Short sentences. Food, fighting, loyalty to the city. No complex topics.

grobb.culture: Troll city, simple and direct with swamp culture
grobb.atmosphere: Similar to Oggok -- simple, direct. Slightly more cunning than Ogres. Swamp culture.

halas.atmosphere: Northern warrior culture. Respect strength and courage.

rivervale.culture: Halfling shire, cheerful, food-obsessed, slightly naive
rivervale.atmosphere: Pastoral community. Cheerful, food-obsessed, slightly naive.

paineel.culture: Heretic Erudite city, dark magic, necromancy, secrecy
paineel.atmosphere: NPCs are guarded and suspicious even to allies.

cabeast.culture: Iksar city, deeply isolationist, suspicious of non-Iksar
cabeast.atmosphere: References to the fallen Iksar Empire, racial memory of servitude under the Ring of Scale dragons.

cabwest.culture: Iksar city, deeply isolationist, suspicious of non-Iksar
cabwest.atmosphere: References to the fallen Iksar Empire, racial memory of servitude under the Ring of Scale dragons.

sharvahl.culture: Vah Shir city, proud cat-people, tribal honor
key_threats: Adapting to contact with Norrath races
sharvahl.atmosphere: Newcomers to wider Norrath contact. Proud, honorable, tribal culture.
